summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of navigation functionality, course/blog detail pages, authentication UI improvements, and mobile responsiveness. All major navigation features are working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Splash screen takes very long to complete (30+ seconds) and sometimes reappears on navigation

passed_tests: Course detail page /courses/12 shows course info, price, buy now, curriculum, what you'll learn, requirements, more courses
Course detail page /courses/10 shows different course data correctly
Blog detail page /blog/modulus-of-a-complex-number shows article content and related articles sidebar
Blog detail page /blog/complex-numbers shows different article content
Clicking 'View Course' on courses page navigates to /courses/:id
Clicking 'Read More' on blog page navigates to /blog/:slug
Blog detail page back button navigates to /blog
Related articles on blog detail page navigate correctly
Start Module buttons on Meiporul AR page link to course detail pages (6 buttons found)
Login page has branding panel with features list and stats (like signup page)
Login page on mobile (390px) shows branded header with logo
Get Started page on mobile shows branded header with logo
Course detail page works on mobile viewport
All CTA buttons navigate properly (Get Started, Explore Courses tested)
Navigation bar with all links (Home, About, Courses, Blog, Contact, Meiporul AR) working
Course cards display correctly with View Course buttons
Blog cards display correctly with Read More buttons
Authentication pages have proper branding and mobile headers
action_item_for_main_agent: Optimize splash screen loading time - currently takes 30+ seconds to complete which impacts user experience. Consider reducing animation duration or adding skip option.
